---
name: Content / design change
about: Propose a content, messaging, or design change
title: "Change: "
labels: enhancement
---

## What

What should change (copy, section, page, visual)?

## Why

What's the goal — clearer messaging, better flow, new content?

## Suggested approach

Describe the desired result. Keep it consistent with the messaging in `CLAUDE.md`
(tagline, positioning) and the NamWeb design tokens.

## Notes

References, examples, or edge cases.
